python - <<'PY'
import json
from agent_kit.loop import run_turn
from agent_kit.model import FakeModel
from agent_kit.store.sqlite import SQLiteStore
store = SQLiteStore(':memory:')
store.create_feedback(kind='style', content='Short.', source='explicit_save_request')
store.create_feedback(kind='friction', content='Repeated ask.', source='agent_observation')
model = FakeModel(script=[{'final_text': 'done', 'provider_request_id': 'req_1'}])
run_turn(epic_id=None, input='hello', store=store, model=model, model_id='fake')
print('model_active_feedback_count=' + str(len(model.calls[0]['hot_context']['active_feedback'])))
print('model_unresolved_observation_count=' + str(len(model.calls[0]['hot_context']['unresolved_observations'])))
raw = store._conn.execute('SELECT prompt_snapshot FROM bot_turns').fetchone()['prompt_snapshot']
summary = json.loads(raw)['hot_context']
print('snapshot_counts=' + json.dumps({'active_feedback_count': summary['active_feedback_count'], 'unresolved_observation_count': summary['unresolved_observation_count']}, sort_keys=True))
PY

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated run_turn to always call store.load_hot_context(active_epic_id), including no-epic turns, instead of synthesizing a minimal no-epic context in the loop. Preserved existing hot-context keys through the store adapter contract and extended _summarize_hot_context to include active_feedback_count and unresolved_observation_count. Added the hot-context summary to the per-model-call prompt_snapshot/request summary so the final stored prompt snapshot includes feedback and observation counts. Verified with a fake-model no-epic test that global style feedback and unresolved observations are present before any epic is selected, plus a direct smoke command confirming model hot context and persisted prompt snapshot counts.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. run_turn now calls store.load_hot_context(active_epic_id) even when active_epic_id is None. `tests/test_run_turn.py` asserts a no-epic fake-model turn receives active global feedback and unresolved observations before any epic is selected, and that `prompt_snapshot.hot_context` includes active_feedback_count and unresolved_observation_count while preserving recent message/tool-call counts.
